market_context.dominant_theme: US-Iran ceasefire hopes driving risk-on sentiment; Hormuz blockade fully implemented but diplomatic resolution being negotiated

EURUSD.notes: DXY retreat supports EUR upside; ECB rate hold expected; Fibo 0.382 recovery

GBPUSD.notes: Bearish structure intact; rejected at Fibo 0.382; BOE dovish pivot signals; below all key MAs

USDJPY.notes: BOJ ultra-cautious; yen structurally weak; geopolitical JPY haven flows are counterweight

USDCHF.notes: CHF benefits from haven flows; precise data not available

XAUUSD.notes: Geopolitical safe haven + central bank buying + inflation fears; GS target 5400 by end 2026; consolidation near ATH

XAGUSD.notes: +1.74% today; industrial demand (semiconductors, solar) + geopolitical haven

SP500.notes: New all-time high; S&P recovered all losses since Iran war started; tech leading; Iran news dependency HIGH

NASDAQ.notes: +1.59% today; best 11-day streak in history; Broadcom, Meta, Tesla leading; TSMC/NFLX earnings after close today

DOW.notes: -0.08% today; industrials and materials lagging; diverging from Nasdaq

WTI.notes: +0.68% today; Hormuz blockade vs ceasefire hopes creates equilibrium; extreme volatility risk on any diplomatic news

BRENT.notes: -0.04% today; stabilizing above 94; awaiting diplomatic resolution

NIKKEI.notes: +0.81% to record high; driven by Iran deal hopes; BOJ cautious supporting equities

HANGSENG.notes: Futures +0.7% vs prior close; geopolitical optimism lifting Asian markets

VIX.notes: Well below crisis peak; could spike to 25-30 on Iran news reversal

US_10Y_yield.notes: Data from April 10; Fed hawkish stance supporting yields

US_2Y_yield.notes: Normalization of curve; rates expected to stay elevated

fear_greed_index.notes: Equity sentiment recovered to greed zone on ceasefire hopes; beware reversal

key_risks.direction: Oil spike >100$; equities crash; gold >5000$; JPY/CHF surge

key_risks.risk: TSMC or NFLX earnings miss (after-hours April 16)
Fed hawkish surprise (unexpected data or speech)
key_risks.direction: USD strength; equity pressure; gold pullback

key_risks.risk: Conflict escalation to other regional actors (Saudi Arabia, Israel)

Record 11-day streak; AI theme dominant (Broadcom, Meta, Tesla); tight stop mandatory
Bearish technical structure confirmed; BOE dovish signals; Fibo rejection
